title: Chapter 44
content:
Chapter 44: Chapter 44: Mei Nightrider

"I’m sorry, it’s my fault, I shouldn’t be overconfident and bring you two to this place."

After a few minute Mio and Mia still unconscious, so Damon asks the system.

"System, why they haven’t woken up yet?"

[It’s due to the impact, all their injuries already healed with recovery pill, but the concussion effect still there, so they won’t be woken up at least for a day.]

"I see then first I need to get them out of here and find somewhere safe."

Then he lay the girls first and then stood up. But their body suddenly started to float.

"What?! What happen?" Damon questions the situation.

"You don’t have to worry about them~, I’ll take care of them." Damon could hear a sudden voice talking to him.

A figure appears in front of him. A mature woman with pale skin and huge breasts stood in front of him.

Her full lips, painted a vibrant red, flashed a seductive smile. Seeing her suddenly, Damon jumps back and turn into a battle stance.

"Hoho~, you are really interesting, boy~, but you don’t have worry, I’m just taking care of my daughters here~" she said with seductive voice and give Damon a wink.

Being called a boy, Damon feel insulted, and speak up to complain.

"Boy—? Who are you calling boy? I’m a man, I have a big dick, I can prove it to—, wait, daughters?!"

Damon too occupied by the insult he didn’t realize that the mature lady said about Mio and Mia being her daughters.

"Ahh, you are their mother. Allow me to introduce myself, I’m Damon Arcknight, please forget about what I’m saying before." He bows to her.

"Hahaha~, you’re cute, looks like my daughters found themself a fine man." the lady laugh normally but every movement make her boobs bouncing.

Looking at her bouncing boobs, he began to scan her body with pervy eyes.

She wears black dress that clung to showed off her ample cleavage, the pale skin, and the seductive curve of her body, down to a slim waist and culminating in wide hips.

The outline of her rounded butt was evident where the form-fitting gown clung to her frame, her thick, jade legs boldly showcased through high slits in the fabric that offered glimpses of flawless skin.

Damon’s golden eyes narrowed slightly, tracing the captivating, mature silhouette of the woman as she prepared to depart. His mind raced, already calculating the possibilities of such a rare prize.

’What a shockingly fine milf... She carries herself with such a regal, yet inherently lewd air. If I manage to conquer her as well, I could experience the divine taste of the mother and her daughters all at once. Oyakodon...’ the thought alone is enough to leave Damon breathless.

A bulge began to appear in Damon’s pants as her voluptuous body enter his mind.

"Anyway, I’m Mei Nightrider, as you know, I’m their mother. Thank you for saving them." she look the surrounding, as he snapped Damon from his fantasy.

"No, it’s my job to protect my loved ones." He said with serious face.

"Anyway~, I’m going take the back to the sect to recover. What are you going to do now?" Mei asks Damon, as she speak normally but her voice come out in seductive way.

"I’m going to to train before goin back to the sect, I don’t want something like this happen again." Damon said and a determination flow on his face.

"Alright then, if you meet me again, I will give you a reward for saving my daughters, and maybe you can even prove to me that you are not a boy~" she said as she lick her lips in playful way.

"See you later~ Damon~."

She started floating along with Mio and Mia as she looks at a large bulge on Damon’s pants with eyes full of lust.

As Mei slowly fly away with Mio and Mia. Damon activated his Incubus Celestial Eyes on Mei.

[Name: Mei Nightrider]

[Age: 133]

[Cultivation: Saint Spirit Realm - Ninth Level]

[Relationship: Taking an interest]

[Interest: 20/100]

[Chastity: Broken by Childbirth]

[Lust: 0/100]

[Affinities: Fire: 150, Charm: 150, Illusion: 150]

[Spiritual Roots: Glamour Spiritual Roots] [Sovereign Grade - Peak]

[Bloodline: Blood of Divine Nine-tailed Fox] [Saint Grade - Low]

[Physique: Body of Divine Nine-tailed Fox] [Saint Grade - Low]

[Traits: Seductive, Dominatrix, Manipulative, Big Mommy]

’What the hell?!! What kind of status is this? System, explain it, please...’

[What host want to know?]

"Let’s start with her cultivation ha far is it. From the sword master and sword grandmaster memories it only focuses on sword, while there is some information about cultivation it’s only up until King Spirit realm."

[In this world cultivation divide by nine realms Elementary, True, Earth, Heavenly, King, Emperor, Saint, Sovereign and origin spirit realm. Each realm as host knows divided by nine levels.]

"I see so, she already near top of this world. Look like i got a powerful mother-in-law, a sexy one at that. But why she already takes an interest on me?"

[Host didn’t know but she been following host since you left the sect.]

"What? So, you have detection function? Why didn’t you tell me?"

[Host didn’t ask.]

’Look like this system getting more personality.’

[No, I’m not.]

"What the? That meant for me thinking internally not talking to you!" Damon shout angrily, eventually he let out a give up sigh.

"Anyway, explain to me why her status said that her chastity broken by childbirth?"

[It’s because her trait. The combination of Seductive, Dominatrix, and Manipulative traits make her see all men below her and just a toy to play with, but her Big Mommy traits make her want a baby, so she probably took some talented man sperm and inject it into herself as virgin.]

’That means... the look that she gave me, just now...’ Damon felt chills from his back upon realization.

’No, no, no, I’m Incubus I won’t lost to a dominatrix, I’ll fix her and show her what a real man is... what a real pleasure is...’

A determine face appear on Damon face.
